candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite empirical prediction packages admitted through a strict data-only parser while census and model-admitted receipt authority remain protected.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of package, parser, field, execution, authority, comparison, response and extension forms.

excluded_inputs: contributor Python, native source, shell commands, modules or callables
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 256-form product and sole preserving form.
statement: Within the registered empirical-package grammar, contributor material can enter official prediction without gaining execution or scientific authority in exactly one form: strict data-only program fields are parsed by the admitted interpreter, the census and model-admitted receipts are identical before and after handling, and every extra field, executable source or protected-tree change halts admission.
title: Hostile empirical-package and authority protection
